description.en: Creating the foundational legal document for a partnership firm.

description.en: Preparing agreements for Limited Liability Partnerships.

description.en: Defining roles, responsibilities, and equity among co-founders.

description.ur: شریک بانیوں کے درمیان کردار، ذمہ داریاں اور ایکویٹی کی وضاحت کرنا۔

description.en: Securing terms with your vendors and suppliers.
description.hi: अपने विक्रेताओं और आपूर्तिकर्ताओं के साथ शर्तों को सुरक्षित करना।

description.en: Legal agreements for franchising your business.

description.en: Defining how equity is divided and vested among co-founders.
